heading: Omitted
label: 131 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided for a Delegate in the House of Representatives of the United States and prescribed his qualifications, was omitted in view of the admission of Alaska into the Union.act May 7, 1906, ch. 2083, § 134 Stat. 169
